button.description:
<token_mapping>
| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| padding-inline (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-padding-x → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | ✅ |
| padding-block (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-padding-y → {spacing.xs} | --semantic-spacing-xs | ✅ |
| font-size (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-font-size → {font.size.sm} | --semantic-font-size-sm | ✅ |
| gap (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-gap → {spacing.xs} | --semantic-spacing-xs | ✅ |
| min-height (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-min-height | 32px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| icon-size (sm) | --component-button-size-sm-icon-size | 16px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| padding-inline (md) | --component-button-size-md-padding-x → {spacing.md} | --semantic-spacing-md | ✅ |
| padding-block (md) | --component-button-size-md-padding-y → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | ✅ |
| font-size (md) | --component-button-size-md-font-size → {font.size.sm} | --semantic-font-size-sm | ✅ |
| gap (md) | --component-button-size-md-gap → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | ✅ |
| min-height (md) | --component-button-size-md-min-height | 40px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| icon-size (md) | --component-button-size-md-icon-size | 20px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| padding-inline (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-padding-x → {spacing.lg} | --semantic-spacing-lg | ✅ |
| padding-block (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-padding-y → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | ✅ |
| font-size (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-font-size → {font.size.md} | --semantic-font-size-md | ✅ |
| gap (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-gap → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | ✅ |
| min-height (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-min-height | 48px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| icon-size (lg) | --component-button-size-lg-icon-size | 24px (valeur brute sans alias token) | ⚠️ TOKEN_MANQUANT |
| border-radius | --component-button-radius → {radius.md} | --semantic-radius-md | ✅ |
| border-width | --component-button-border-width → {borderWidth.default} | --semantic-border-width-default | ✅ |
| font-weight | --component-button-font-weight → {font.weight.semibold} | --semantic-font-weight-semibold | ✅ |
| font-family | --component-button-font-family → {font.family.default} | --semantic-font-family-default | ✅ |
| transition | --component-button-transition | all 150ms ease-in-out | ✅ |
| outline-width (focus) | --component-button-focus-ring-width | 2px | ✅ |
| outline-offset (focus) | --component-button-focus-ring-offset → {spacing} | 2px |

input.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| padding-inline | --component-input-size-sm-padding-x → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | sm |
| padding-block | --component-input-size-sm-padding-y → {spacing.xs} | --semantic-spacing-xs | sm |
| font-size | --component-input-size-sm-font-size → {font.size.sm} | --semantic-font-size-sm | sm |
| min-height | --component-input-size-sm-min-height → 32px | --component-input-size-sm-min-height | sm |
| padding-inline | --component-input-size-md-padding-x → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | md |
| padding-block | --component-input-size-md-padding-y → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | md |
| font-size | --component-input-size-md-font-size → {font.size.md} | --semantic-font-size-md | md |
| min-height | --component-input-size-md-min-height → 40px | --component-input-size-md-min-height | md |
| padding-inline | --component-input-size-lg-padding-x → {spacing.md} | --semantic-spacing-md | lg |
| padding-block | --component-input-size-lg-padding-y → {spacing.sm} | --semantic-spacing-sm | lg |
| font-size | --component-input-size-lg-font-size → {font.size.lg} | --semantic-font-size-lg | lg |
| min-height | --component-input-size-lg-min-height → 48px | --component-input-size-lg-min-height | lg |
| background-color | --component-input-bg-default → {color.bg.primary} | --semantic-color-bg-primary | default |
| background-color | --component-input-bg-disabled → {color.bg.disabled} | --semantic-color-bg-disabled | disabled |
| color | --component-input-text-default → {color.text.primary} | --semantic-color-text-primary | default |
| color (placeholder) | --component-input-text-placeholder → {color.text.tertiary} | --semantic-color-text-tertiary | placeholder |
| color | --component-input-text-disabled → {color.text.disabled} | --semantic-color-text-disabled | disabled |
| border-color | --component-input-border-default → {color.border.default} | --semantic-color-border-default | default |
| border-color | --component-input-border-hover → {color.border.strong} | --semantic-color-border-strong | hover |
| border-color | --component-input-border-focus → {color.border.focus} | --semantic-color-border-focus | focus |
| border-color | --component-input-border-error → {color.danger.500} | --semantic-color-danger-500 | error |
| border-color | --component-input-border-disabled → {color.border.disabled} | --semantic-color-border-disabled | disabled |
| border-radius | --component-input-radius → {radius.md} | --semantic-radius-md | all |
| border-width | --component-input-border-width → {borderWidth.default} | --semantic-border-width-default | all |
| outline | —  | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | focus-visible |

card.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| padding (sm) | --component-card-padding-sm → {spacing.md} | var(--component-card-padding-sm) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| padding (md) | --component-card-padding-md → {spacing.lg} | var(--component-card-padding-md) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| padding (lg) | --component-card-padding-lg → {spacing.xl} | var(--component-card-padding-lg) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| border-radius | --component-card-radius → {radius.lg} | var(--component-card-radius) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| background-color | --component-card-bg → {color.bg.primary} | var(--component-card-bg) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| border-color | --component-card-border → {color.border.default} | var(--component-card-border) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| box-shadow | --component-card-shadow → {shadow.100} | var(--component-card-shadow) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
| outline (focus-visible) | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | ⚠️ MANQUANT |

badge.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| padding-inline | --component-badge-padding-x → --semantic-spacing-sm | non résolu | default |
| padding-block | --component-badge-padding-y → --semantic-spacing-xs | non résolu | default |
| font-size | --component-badge-font-size → --semantic-font-size-xs | non résolu | default |
| font-weight | --component-badge-font-weight → --semantic-font-weight-medium | non résolu | default |
| border-radius | --component-badge-radius → --semantic-radius-full | non résolu | default |
| background-color | --component-badge-bg | non résolu | default |
| background-color | --component-badge-bg--hover | non résolu | :hover |
| color | --component-badge-color | non résolu | default |
| border-color | --component-badge-border-color | non résolu | default |
| outline | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | non résolu | :focus-visible |
| opacity | (0.5 hardcodé état disabled) | — | :disabled |
